sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Card, CardContent, Typography, TextField, Button, Grid, Table, TableHead, TableRow, TableCell, TableBody, Box, } from '@mui/material'; export default function HQDashboard() { const [productForm, setProductForm] = useState({ name: '', details: '', base_price: '', }); const [assignForm, setAssignForm] = useState({ product_id: '', outlet_id: '', price: '', stock_quantity: '', }); const reports = [ { outlet: 'Dhaka Branch', revenue: 50000 }, { outlet: 'Ctg Branch', revenue: 35000 }, ]; const handleCreateProduct = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log('API Call: POST /api/products', productForm); }; const handleAssignProduct = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log('API Call: POST /api/outlets/products', assignForm); }; return ( // Box ব্যবহার করা হয়েছে বাইরের মার্জিন এবং গ্যাপ দেওয়ার জন্য HQ Control Center {/* ১. ক্রিয়েট মাস্টার মেনু */} 1. Create Master Menu Item
setProductForm({ ...productForm, name: e.target.value }) } /> setProductForm({ ...productForm, details: e.target.value, }) } /> setProductForm({ ...productForm, base_price: e.target.value, }) } />
{/* ২. অ্যাসাইন মেনু টু আউটলেট */} 2. Assign to Outlet
setAssignForm({ ...assignForm, product_id: e.target.value, }) } /> setAssignForm({ ...assignForm, outlet_id: e.target.value, }) } /> setAssignForm({ ...assignForm, price: e.target.value }) } /> setAssignForm({ ...assignForm, stock_quantity: e.target.value, }) } />
{/* ৩. বেসিক রিপোর্টিং */} 3. Revenue Reports Outlet Total Revenue {reports.map((row, idx) => ( {row.outlet} ৳{row.revenue} ))}
); }
